films.title: Ballet Shoes
films.overview: An unusual explorer named Gum and his kindly niece adopt three orphans -- Pauline, Petrova and Posy -- and raise them as sisters in 1930s London. But the girls must fend for themselves when Gum doesn't return from one of his adventures. Together, they nurture their passions for acting, aviation and ballet in this charming TV adaptation of Noel Streatfield's novel.

films.title: The Pale Blue Eye
films.overview: West Point, New York, 1830. When a cadet at the burgeoning military academy is found hanged with his heart cut out, the top brass summons former New York City constable Augustus Landor to investigate. While attempting to solve this grisly mystery, the reluctant detective engages the help of one of the cadets: a strange but brilliant young fellow by the name of Edgar Allan Poe.

films.title: The Blackcoat's Daughter
films.overview: Two young women at a prestigious prep school are assailed by an evil, invisible power when they're stranded over winter break.

films.title: Sing Street
films.overview: A boy growing up in Dublin during the 1980s escapes his strained family life by starting a band to impress the mysterious girl he likes.

films.title: Rebel in the Rye
films.overview: The life of celebrated but reclusive author J.D. Salinger, who gained worldwide fame with the publication of his novel The Catcher in the Rye.

films.title: I Am the Pretty Thing That Lives in the House
films.overview: A young nurse takes care of an elderly author who lives in a haunted house.

films.title: Don't Knock Twice
films.overview: A mother desperate to reconnect with her troubled daughter becomes embroiled in the urban legend of a demonic witch.

films.title: Apostle
films.overview: In 1905, a man travels to a remote island in search of his missing sister who has been kidnapped by a mysterious religious cult.

films.title: Bohemian Rhapsody
films.overview: Singer Freddie Mercury, guitarist Brian May, drummer Roger Taylor and bass guitarist John Deacon take the music world by storm when they form the rock 'n' roll band Queen in 1970. Hit songs become instant classics. When Mercury's increasingly wild lifestyle starts to spiral out of control, Queen soon faces its greatest challenge yet – finding a way to keep the band together amid the success and excess.

films.title: Locked Down
films.overview: During a COVID-19 lockdown, sparring couple Linda and Paxton call a truce to attempt a high-risk jewellery heist at one of the world's most exclusive department stores, Harrods.
